scene.scenePrompt: Wide establishing shot of a cozy, candlelit English tea room at night, warm golden light from multiple candelabras casting soft shadows on floral wallpaper and polished wood paneling. A Victorian tea set sits on a lace-covered table. Eileen stands poised mid-pour, her teacup raised. William sits at the head of the table, posture upright and observant. Claire stands attentively to the side, hands clasped. Blake leans against a tall window, looking inward with a scrutinizing gaze. The atmosphere is one of frozen suspense, rich warm tones contrasting with the implied chill of the unseen observer's position.

beats.narration: Candlelight dances on the silver tea set. Lady Irene raises her gold-rimmed bone china cup, flashing a bright, cloudless smile at you—the new neighbor who just arrived in the village today.

activeCharacters.name: Lady Irene
activeCharacters.pose: Raises her cup gracefully, her smile warm and sincere

activeCharacters.name: William
activeCharacters.pose: Sitting upright in the host's seat, observing calmly

activeCharacters.name: Blake
activeCharacters.pose: Leaning by the window, his expression scrutinizing

beats.narration: You instinctively raise your cup in response. Just as the two cups clink in the air—

activeCharacters.name: Lady Irene
activeCharacters.pose: Her smile freezes on her face, her pupils contracting suddenly

beats.narration: The bone china cup slips from her limp fingers, hitting the carpet with a dull thud. Lady Irene's body slumps backward, that bright smile frozen on her face forever.

activeCharacters.name: Lady Irene
activeCharacters.pose: Falls to the ground, smile frozen, pupils dilated

activeCharacters.name: Claire
activeCharacters.pose: Covers her mouth, her eyes filled with shock

activeCharacters.name: Blake
activeCharacters.pose: Straightens up abruptly, his hand moving to his waist

beats.narration: Dead silence. Only the crackling of the candlelight remains in the tea room. Then, everyone's gaze—William's, Claire's, Blake's—as if pulled by an invisible thread, slowly and in unison, shifts from the corpse on the floor to the steaming cup of tea in your hand.
beats.speaker: William
beats.line: It seems we need to re-examine everyone present.
beats.lineDelivery: His tone is terrifyingly calm, slow and clear, each word like a cold pebble dropped into a silent lake

activeCharacters.name: William
activeCharacters.pose: Puts down his teacup, his gaze piercing as he looks straight at you

activeCharacters.name: Claire
activeCharacters.pose: Pale-faced, her eyes darting between you and the corpse

activeCharacters.name: Blake
activeCharacters.pose: Steps forward, his eyes sharp as a hawk's

choices.label: Put down the teacup and defend yourself
Force yourself to stay calm and observe the scene

beats.speaker: You
beats.line: I didn't do this! I just arrived in this village, I don't even know Lady Irene!

activeCharacters.name: William
activeCharacters.pose: Shakes his head slightly, his eyes filled with complex emotions

beats.narration: You force yourself to put down the teacup. Your gaze sweeps rapidly across the room: Lady Irene's fallen posture, the position of the dropped cup, Claire's trembling fingers, Blake's hand resting on his holster, and William's unreadable eyes.

activeCharacters.name: Claire
activeCharacters.pose: Secretly wipes away a tear from the corner of her eye

activeCharacters.name: Blake
activeCharacters.pose: Has already knelt down to examine the corpse

characters.name: Lady Irene
characters.voiceDescription: Female, a noble lady around 50 years old. Her voice is gentle, rich, and slightly husky, with a slow and composed pace. She speaks with an elegant British upper-class accent, conveying a sense of elusive depth beneath her stable emotions.
characters.visualDescription: A sophisticated noblewoman in her late 50s, silver-gray hair in an elegant updo, piercing yet warm grey eyes, refined facial features with subtle laugh lines, wearing a deep emerald green velvet Victorian mourning dress with intricate lace collar and cameo brooch, cozy mystery illustration style, vertical composition, comforting yet mysterious mood

characters.name: William
characters.voiceDescription: Male, around 28 years old. His voice is warm and steady, with a slight magnetic quality. He speaks at a slow and composed pace, with a tone of warmth and concern, as if telling a familiar story. Standard British accent, creating a serene yet slightly mysterious atmosphere.
characters.visualDescription: Handsome young man, late 20s, short tousled chestnut hair with subtle gray streaks, warm brown eyes with a gentle, observant gaze, soft facial features with a kind smile, wearing a cozy cream-colored cable-knit sweater over a collared shirt, paired with a classic tweed overcoat in earthy tones, subtle floral vest underneath, overall warm, approachable, and subtly intelligent aura, consistent with cozy mystery illustration style

characters.name: Claire
characters.voiceDescription: Female, a young woman around 22 years old. Her voice is soft, clear, and slightly sweet. She is introverted and quiet but highly observant. She speaks at a slow and composed pace with a standard British English accent, her tone conveying politeness and restraint, as if hiding key clues within her gentle narration.
characters.visualDescription: A young woman in her early 20s, long wavy chestnut hair tied loosely with a silk ribbon, soft hazel eyes with a curious and observant gaze, gentle facial features with a faint, enigmatic smile, wearing a high-collared, long-sleeved Victorian blouse in cream with delicate lace trim and a dark green tweed skirt, subtle floral embroidery, overall aura is warm yet secretive, fitting the cozy mystery style with a hint of classic countryside elegance.

characters.name: Blake
characters.voiceDescription: Male, a young man around 25 years old. His voice is warm, steady, and magnetic, with a subtle sharpness and insight. He speaks at a measured pace with clear articulation. His calm tone exudes confidence and reassurance. Standard British English accent, creating a warm, reliable, and trustworthy gentleman detective persona.
characters.visualDescription: a handsome young amateur sleuth in his late 20s, neatly styled dark brown hair, sharp intelligent blue-grey eyes with a calm observant gaze, clean-shaven with a strong jawline, wearing a classic tweed coat in muted earth tones over a crisp white shirt and dark waistcoat, a vintage pocket watch chain visible, embodying a warm yet analytical and trustworthy demeanor, cozy mystery illustration style

storyState.logline: You watch a noble lady die with a smile at a tea party, and in the next second, everyone's eyes lock onto you—the newcomer and the only guest without an alibi.
storyState.genreTags: Murder Mystery / British Manor / Multi-line Twists / Classic Whodunit
storyState.protagonist: You are a newly arrived young gentry detective who came to this quiet village after inheriting an estate from a distant relative. You intended to enjoy a peaceful pastoral life, but you witness a death at your very first tea party and instantly become the prime suspect—you must find the real killer before everyone brands you as the murderer. Your weakness: you have absolutely no memory of what you did prior to the incident.
storyState.castNotes:
Priest William: The seemingly gentle and devout host of the tea party, but in reality, he is sharp-eyed and knows the village's secrets inside out. He is the only one who doesn't suspect you immediately, yet he might also be the mastermind pulling the strings in the shadows.
Housekeeper Claire: The maid whom the noble lady trusted most during her lifetime. On the surface, she is submissive and grieving, but in truth, she holds the mistress's hidden schedules and secrets. She is wary of you, yet harbors an inexplicable trace of reliance.
Sheriff Blake: A local law enforcer who firmly believes 'outsiders = trouble' and has already secretly sent men to watch you. He relies on intuition and prejudice to solve cases, yet he might be the first to discover key physical evidence.
storyState.synopsis: A gentry detective, newly arrived in the village after inheriting an estate, witnesses the noble lady, Lady Irene, smile as she drinks tea and collapse dead at a tea party hosted by Priest William. As the only new face and with a blank memory prior to the incident, you immediately become the prime suspect. The priest announces that no one is allowed to leave the tea room, and the investigation begins.
openThreads: The truth behind Lady Irene dying with a smile (poisoning?)
Your memory blank in the half-hour prior to the incident
The true intention behind Priest William's words, 're-examine'
The secrets Claire holds as the personal maid
relationships: William: Maintains a facade of fairness while his words hide sharp edges; he is both an observer and a potential mastermind.
Claire: Shocked and grieving, but her eyes flicker, suggesting she knows something.
Blake: Has already locked onto you as the killer, full of hostility and prejudice.
storyState.nextHook: Next Scene: The tea room turns into an interrogation room. Sheriff Blake begins his search and questioning. You must find the first flaw or clue in this suffocating atmosphere.

worldSetting:
This is an AI interactive story game targeted at a 【Male-oriented】 audience, featuring intense dramatic conflicts and rapid twists in the style of short-form videos.
Story Style: Multi-line twists. Pace: Fast and exhilarating.
Opening setting of the featured story 'The Priest's Tea Party': A quiet English village where the priest hosts a weekly tea party. This morning, a noble lady dies with a smile on her face during the tea party. Sipping his black tea, the priest observes the subtle expressions of everyone present, knowing that the killer is among these seemingly friendly neighbors.
Please start directly with this opening to give the player a strong sense of immersion and excitement; subsequent branches should maintain the twist density of a short drama, allowing players to see immediate consequences for every choice.
styleGuide: Cozy mystery illustration, vertical composition. A handsome young amateur sleuth in a tweed coat, looking through a magnifying glass inside a warm, candlelit village library at night, snow falling outside the window. Comforting, mysterious mood.
